tasks.subject: Task 1: chunk-framing primitives (chunks.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement writeChunk/readChunk with CRC32 over (type || payload) and a 16 MiB length sanity cap on every non-DLTA chunk.

**Files:** chunks.go (new), chunks_test.go (new)

**Verify:** `go test -run TestChunk -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["chunks.go", "chunks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestChunk -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["writeChunk emits correct framing", "readChunk verifies CRC and enforces length cap", "round-trip preserves bytes", "bad-CRC and truncation errors are clear"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Manifest CreatedUTC → CreatedUnix int64; drop runtime suffix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate Manifest.CreatedUTC string → CreatedUnix int64. Drop the runtime.Version() suffix from tool_version. JSON path keeps working until Task 6 replaces it.

**Files:** manifest.go, pack.go, inspect.go, manifest_test.go, inspect_test.go

**Verify:** `go build ./... && go test -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "pack.go", "inspect.go", "manifest_test.go", "inspect_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go test -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CreatedUnix int64 replaces CreatedUTC string", "runtime.Version() suffix removed from tool_version", "all tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: MFST payload codec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement encodeMFSTPayload and decodeMFSTPayload per spec §MFST.

**Files:** chunks.go, chunks_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -run TestMFST -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["chunks.go", "chunks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestMFST -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip preserves all 5 MFST fields", "truncated payloads return ErrUnexpectedEOF"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: TRKS payload codec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement encodeTRKSPayload / decodeTRKSPayload per spec §TRKS.

**Files:** chunks.go, chunks_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -run TestTRKS -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["chunks.go", "chunks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestTRKS -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2-track round-trip preserves all fields", "Hashes left zero (populated by HASH codec)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: HASH payload codec
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement encodeHASHPayload and decodeHASHPayload per spec §HASH. Decoder mutates m.Tracks (already sized by Task 4's decoder).

**Files:** chunks.go, chunks_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -run TestHASH -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["chunks.go", "chunks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestHASH -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip preserves all hashes", "unknown algo rejected", "bad digest_len rejected", "target out-of-range rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: WriteContainer / ReadContainer chunk-based rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace WriteContainer/ReadContainer with chunk-based implementations. Drop the JSON encoding path entirely.

**Files:** manifest.go, manifest_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest.go", "manifest_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chunk-based WriteContainer emits 4 chunks", "chunk-based ReadContainer validates structure", "all existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Corruption rejection tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cover every rejection path enumerated in spec §Error handling with discrete sub-tests.

**Files:** manifest_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -run TestContainerRejectsCorruption -v ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["manifest_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestContainerRejectsCorruption -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["15 sub-tests covering every named rejection path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Refresh e2e_redump container-size bounds for v2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refresh per-fixture container-size bounds in e2e_redump_test.go to reflect v2 actual sizes with ~5% headroom.

**Files:** e2e_redump_test.go

**Verify:** `go test -tags redump_data -count=1 ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e_redump_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -tags redump_data -count=1 ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-fixture bounds match v2 actual sizes"]}
```
